Off Calendar May-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff BOB TEMPLE in propria persona nd opposing party

Mr. Temple did not give notice of intent to argue the tentative ruling. Therefore, no argument was entertained. TEntative ruling adopted -- defendant San Mateo County's Demurrer: SUSTAINED without leave to amend. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
